//: Typecheck-only config for the DOM sources — the web browser app + the Electron renderer view (React). The bundlers (vite / electron-vite) BUILD them via esbuild (no typecheck); run `tsc -p tsconfig.web.json` to typecheck them in your editor / CI. The Node `tsconfig.json` compiles the cli boot + web serve host; the two configs partition the tree by runtime (Node vs DOM).
